videos.headline: Georgia outduels Ole Miss in thriller
videos.description: Georgia gives Ole Miss their first loss of the season as they take down the Rebels in a thriller.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Georgia outduels Ole Miss in thriller) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Gunner Stockton's five TDs enable Georgia to edge Ole Miss
videos.description: QB Stockton completes 26 of 31 passes for 289 yards and four touchdowns while also rushing for 59 yards and another score in the Dawgs' epic 43-35 win over the Rebels.

videos.headline: Peyton Woodring drills 51-yard FG
videos.description: Georgia takes a 3-0 lead on a Peyton Woodring 51-yard field goal.

videos.headline: Trinidad Chambliss scrambles into the end zone for a TD
videos.description: Trinidad Chambliss buys time and rushes for a 7-yard touchdown to give Ole Miss the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trinidad Chambliss scrambles into the end zone for a TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton finds Lawson Luckie for 11-yard TD
videos.description: Lawson Luckie finds himself all alone in the end zone for the 11-yard score to give Georgia a lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton finds Lawson Luckie for 11-yard TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kewan Lacy finds the end zone for a 1-yard TD run
videos.description: Ole Miss makes it a 14-10 game after Kewan Lacy rushes in for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kewan Lacy finds the end zone for a 1-yard TD run) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton gives Georgia the lead with rushing TD
videos.description: Gunner Stockton fakes the handoff and takes it 22 yards to the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton gives Georgia the lead with rushing TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kewan Lacy powers in TD for Ole Miss lead
videos.description: Ole Miss takes the lead back with a Kewan Lacy 1-yard touchdown run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kewan Lacy powers in TD for Ole Miss lead) 2025/10/18 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Peyton Woodring kicks 35-yard field goal) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: De'Zhaun Stribling breaks free for 75-yard TD reception
videos.description: Trinidad Chambliss dumps one off to De'Zhaun Stribling who takes it 75 yards to extend Ole Miss's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (De'Zhaun Stribling breaks free for 75-yard TD reception) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton finds Lawson Luckie for his 2nd TD of the game
videos.description: Lawson Luckie hauls in his 2nd touchdown reception of the game to make it a one-score game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton finds Lawson Luckie for his 2nd TD of the game) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lane Kiffin pokes fun at Kirby Smart after taking timeout
videos.description: Lane Kiffin jokes with a referee after calling a timeout, claiming he was just clapping.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Lane Kiffin pokes fun at Kirby Smart after taking timeout) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Deuce Alexander makes incredible one-handed grab for Ole Miss
videos.description: Ole Miss WR Deuce Alexander makes a fantastic diving one-handed catch for a first down in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Deuce Alexander makes incredible one-handed grab for Ole Miss) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trinidad Chambliss barrels in for an Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Ole Miss QB Trinidad Chambliss muscles across the goal line for a touchdown to extend the Rebels' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trinidad Chambliss barrels in for an Ole Miss TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia draws closer after Nate Frazier's TD
videos.description: Gunner Stockon connects with Nate Frazier for a short touchdown as Georgia cuts into its deficit.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia draws closer after Nate Frazier's TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Peyton Woodring kicks 42-yard field goal) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia's Gunner Stockton relives career day vs. Ole Miss
videos.description: After entering the game with injury concerns, the No. 9 Bulldogs' Stockton reviews his 348 total yards and five TDs over the No. 5 Rebels while praising his teammates' grit.
